Margin Analysis

M
Finance AI · Margin Analysis
High confidenceCOGS + shipping + ads + returnsUpdated today 06:14
Best performer
Monitor Arm holds 41% CM3 — sell more of it
Strong gross margin survives shipping and ads almost intact. It's your most profitable SKU after every cost. Worth more ad budget and shelf priority.
Margin drain
Cylinder Stand loses money after ad spend
47% gross looks healthy, but heavy paid acquisition pulls CM3 to −3%. Every paid sale costs you. Pause its ads or lift price before scaling it.
Margin erosion
A 24-point gap from gross to CM3 across the catalog
Gross margin averages 52% but contribution lands at 29% — shipping and ads eat nearly half. The map below shows which products carry the erosion.
The margin map — where every product really sits
True profit this month · across 9 products
$61,410
7 products earn it · 1 drain it
Profitable after all costs
Loses money after ads
Bubble size = revenue volume

Gross margin is a flattering number. Cylinder Stand sells well and shows 47% gross — but after ads it loses money on every order. The products that earn you a living sit top-right; the ones quietly costing you sit bottom-left.

What to do about it
